{{Infobox character
| name = Mekendi Maxeus
| aliases = Maxeus, Mekendi
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch Guild Head|Guild Head]], Head of the Magisters, [[Magister]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Guild of Magisters|Magister’s Guild]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|instructor, orator, [[Magister]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Mekendi Maxeus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Mekendi Maxeus was a prominent figure serving as the Head of the [[Magisters]]' [[Guild]]. A highly regarded instructor at the [[Imperial]] Academy in the [[Capital]], he was known for his reputation and his composed, gentlemanly demeanor. Physically, he possessed [[Heartlander]] skin and was frequently seen wearing a black mask that obscured his facial expressions, giving him an uncanny and expressionless appearance. He often carried a staff made of charred or gray wood that could emit a luminous flame. As a leader, Maxeus was characterized by his immense and highly controlled [[Intent]], which made him a formidable presence. He was a strategic thinker who viewed political instability and the assassination of figures like [[Alagaeus]], [[Regent of the East]], as opportunities to be leveraged for the benefit of a united [[Empire]]. Despite his calculated approach to conflict and his ability to manage complex political situations, he was considered an enigma by some. His [[life]] ended when a [[Consultant]] [[Soulbound]] and her partner managed to kill him, an event that also resulted in the destruction of his complex mansion located on the outskirts of the [[Capital]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Mekendi Maxeus serves as an instructor at the [[Capital]]’s [[Imperial]] Academy, where they are known for being a trained orator. Characterized by [[Heartlander]] skin and the use of a painted black mask, Maxeus carries a staff made of charred wood. Beyond their teaching duties, they hold the position of one of the [[Guild Heads]]. Specifically, Maxeus acts as the Head of the [[Magisters]], though this guild is currently stretched thin.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] is an instructor at the [[Capital]]’s [[Imperial]] Academy.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] wears a painted black mask and has [[Heartlander]] skin.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] carries a staff of charred wood.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Maxeus is a trained orator.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Mekendi is the first name of Maxeus.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] is one of the [[Guild Heads]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] is the Head of the [[Magisters]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Mekendi Maxeus]]'s [[Guild]] is stretched thin.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Maxeus is an enigma to [[Bareius]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Mekendi Maxeus was a powerful [[Magister]] and [[Guild Head]] who resided in a mansion located on the fringes of the [[Capital]]. While wielding an ash-gray staff, Maxeus addressed a room concerning the provocations of the [[Regents]] and worked to craft various versions of a declaration tailored for different audiences. However, Maxeus was killed a few days prior to the recent events by a [[Consultant]] [[Soulbound]] and her partner. This death resulted in the passing of the influential leader.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] possesses an ash-gray staff.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Maxeus addressed a room regarding the provocation of the [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Maxeus is involved in creating versions of the declaration for different audiences.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] is dead.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mekendi Maxeus]]'s mansion was on the fringes of the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Maxeus was killed a couple of days ago.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] was a [[Guild Head]] and a powerful [[Magister]] who was killed by a [[Consultant]] [[Soulbound]] and her partner.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Mekendi Maxeus is a [[Magister]] who harbors a desire to see the [[Empire]] united. Residing in a private mansion, Maxeus maintains a presence behind a mask. While performing duties on guard, Maxeus was targeted in an attack by [[Shera]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] owns a mansion.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxeus is a [[Magister]] who wants to see a united [[Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Maxeus wears a mask.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] is on guard duty.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] attacked [[Mekendi Maxeus]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Mekendi Maxeus]] was the former Head of the [[Magister]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A female [[Magister]] spoke the name Maxeus during combat.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"Mekendi, my friend, you have to trust me, Maxeus."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|"We provoked the Regents for a calculated reason," Maxeus said, addressing the room.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“There are several versions of this declaration for various audiences,” Maxeus went on.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
